# Change-impact map

This map answers: “When I change this, what else must I inspect?” It is a
review frontier, not permission to edit every listed file.

| Change area | Changed paths | Inspect together | Primary checks |
|---|---|---|---|
| Type schema | `src/memoria_vault/product/workspace_seed/.memoria/schemas/types/**` | Matching folder home<br>Bases and read-API field consumers<br>Linter and pre-commit behavior<br>Note-type and frontmatter documentation | `python3 -m pytest tests/test_schemas.py tests/test_bases.py tests/test_precommit_schema.py tests/test_detectors.py tests/test_package_spine.py` |
| Folder home, staging/quarantine root, or skeleton | `src/memoria_vault/product/workspace_seed/.memoria/schemas/folders.yaml` | Type schemas and package seed<br>Review-gate and pattern fallback constants<br>memoria init and installer scaffold behavior<br>Read surfaces and links | `python3 -m pytest tests/test_schemas.py tests/test_installer_skeleton.py tests/test_runtime_policy.py tests/test_patterns.py tests/test_detectors.py` |
| Dropped installed profile package | `scripts/checks/alpha14_negative_gate.py`<br>`tests/test_profiles.py`<br>`tests/test_installer_skeleton.py` | Alpha.14 no-profile negative tests<br>Installer/profile-mode text<br>Current docs that still describe shipped installed profiles<br>Optional adapter follow-up scope | `python3 -m pytest tests/test_profiles.py tests/test_installer_skeleton.py` |
| Runtime policy | `src/memoria_vault/runtime/policy/**` | Actor policy config loading<br>Review-gated prefix fallback<br>Audit contract<br>Optional adapter tool mappings<br>Fail-closed direct tool denial | `python3 -m pytest tests/test_runtime_policy.py tests/test_policy_hook.py tests/test_policy_gate_completeness.py tests/test_schemas.py` |
| Runtime helpers | `src/memoria_vault/runtime/vaultio.py`<br>`src/memoria_vault/runtime/jsonl.py`<br>`src/memoria_vault/runtime/time.py`<br>`src/memoria_vault/runtime/paths.py` | Frontmatter parsing behavior and PyYAML-free fallback<br>JSONL append/iterate tolerance and parent creation<br>UTC timestamp format expected by telemetry/audit rows<br>Runtime modules that still carry duplicate helper code | `python3 -m pytest tests/test_runtime_helpers.py tests/test_package_spine.py`<br>`python3 -m pytest tests/test_loudness.py tests/test_project_structural_impact.py tests/test_test_env_harness.py` |
| Capture or linter operation | `src/memoria_vault/runtime/capture.py`<br>`src/memoria_vault/runtime/subsystems/integrity/linter/**` | Calibration and schemas<br>Inbox card contract and shared writers<br>Source catalog state and content/blob writes<br>Scheduled-task behavior and generated surfaces | `python3 -m pytest tests/test_capture.py tests/test_inbox_cards.py tests/test_detectors.py` |
| Installer | `scripts/install.sh`<br>`scripts/install.ps1` | Installer reference docs<br>No installed-profile deployment modes<br>Disposable-workspace behavior<br>PowerShell bridge | `bash -n scripts/install.sh`<br>`python3 -m pytest tests/test_installer_skeleton.py`<br>`bash scripts/sandbox/e2e_smoke.py` |
| Package seed or optional adapter boundary | `src/memoria_vault/product/workspace_seed/**`<br>`packages/memoria-obsidian/**`<br>`scripts/checks/plugin_provenance_doctor.py` | Baseline package seed ships only approved Memoria Obsidian files<br>QuickAdd command scripts and Obsidian workspace files stay absent<br>Optional adapter wording does not become baseline behavior<br>Alpha.14 negative gate covers deleted payload contracts | `python3 scripts/checks/plugin_provenance_doctor.py`<br>`python3 -m pytest tests/test_plugin_provenance.py` |
| Offline e2e smoke harness | `scripts/sandbox/e2e_smoke.py`<br>`scripts/sandbox/test_env_harness.py`<br>`tests/fixtures/test-env/**` | Stage names and ordering<br>Disposable-vault assembly assertions<br>Workflow-replay artifacts and deny audit row<br>Shell entrypoint compatibility | `python3 -m pytest tests/test_e2e_smoke_helpers.py tests/test_test_env_harness.py`<br>`bash scripts/sandbox/e2e_smoke.py` |
| Standalone disposable install harness | `scripts/sandbox/install-test-vault-local-llm.sh` | Disposable workspace isolation and guarded wipe checks<br>Standalone installer invocation and package import checks<br>Optional OpenAI-compatible endpoint preflight wording<br>Package-seed, detector, and CLI doctor assertions | `bash scripts/sandbox/install-test-vault-local-llm.sh --help`<br>`python3 -m pytest tests/test_install_test_vault_local_llm.py` |
| Testing gate mechanism | `scripts/verify`<br>`scripts/sandbox/e2e_smoke.py`<br>`.github/workflows/**`<br>`.github/ruleset-contract.yaml`<br>`.agents/playbooks/release.md` | CONTRIBUTING testing and verification guidance<br>Verify-change and release playbooks<br>Release evidence and manual follow-up wording<br>Required-check roster and scripts/verify mode behavior | `python3 scripts/checks/status_doctor.py`<br>`python3 scripts/checks/agents_doctor.py` |
| GitHub workflow or PR policy | `.github/workflows/**`<br>`.github/scripts/pr_policy.py` | Required-check invariant and ruleset assumptions<br>Permissions, event trust, and concurrency<br>Safe and sensitive paths<br>Trusted authors | `python3 scripts/checks/ruleset_doctor.py`<br>`python3 -m pytest tests/test_pr_policy.py tests/test_ruleset_doctor.py` |
| Documentation or agent guidance | `docs/**`<br>`.agents/**`<br>`AGENTS.md` | Section indexes and guide maps<br>Frontmatter, links, and terminology<br>Referenced commands and repository paths<br>Generated agent references | `python3 scripts/checks/docs_doctor.py docs`<br>`python3 scripts/checks/docs_doctor.py --vault-links`<br>`python3 scripts/checks/status_doctor.py`<br>`python3 scripts/checks/agents_doctor.py`<br>`pre-commit run cspell --all-files` |

## How to use the map

1. Start from the changed row.
2. Inspect each named contract for drift.
3. Edit only consumers that genuinely need to change.
4. Run focused checks from the row.
5. Use [test selection](test-selection.md) to decide whether the full gate is required.
